_comment: Declarative model selection policy for the intent layer (project 08). Data, not code — editing this file is not a deploy. Models are referenced by stable alias, never a pinned version ID. See docs/projects/08-intent-layer/spec.md (the 'Model selection policy' section) and src/intent/model-policy.ts.
_roleDefaults_comment: Per-role default model alias. `evaluator` (project 08, A6.2) resolves to an openai model so the autonomous Evaluator adjudicates cross-provider by default; the resolver also takes `distinctFromProvider` at call time, so an openai generator pushes the evaluator back to the anthropic globalFallback. The six product-team roles (project 14, Phase 8): PM and tech lead → fable (anthropic, Fable 5), reviewer + designer → opus (anthropic, Opus 4.8), artifact roles → qa: gpt-5.6-terra, coder: gpt-5.6-sol (openai, via the Codex CLI); the resolver enforces reviewer-vs-coder provider distinctness at resolution time (fail-closed). `planning-critique` is the `/plan` cross-model critique pass — it must be a non-anthropic, coding-capable model because it runs through `runCodex` against a Claude-authored plan.
